testimonials.author: Ashutosh Valani
testimonials.quote: They didn’t just run our campaigns — they held the brand together while we scaled from three products to a category Marico wanted in on.

testimonials.author: Rishabh Chokhani
testimonials.quote: What convinced me was how differently they treated the US and Indian buyer. Most agencies run one campaign everywhere. They understood these are two different customers entirely.

testimonials.author: Rahul Satia
testimonials.quote: They speak like people who’ve actually run a P&L, not just a content calendar. That’s rarer than it should be in this industry.

testimonials.author: Richa Pendeke
testimonials.quote: Every recommendation came with a reason I could check myself. I never once felt like I was being sold a tactic instead of a plan.

testimonials.author: Subhasis Rath
testimonials.quote: Straight answers, even when the honest answer was that something wasn’t working. That’s the only kind of agency relationship worth having.
